terms.definition: Anthropic's public-benefit corporation structure, founded in 2021, committing the company to responsible AI development alongside commercial goals.
Researchers including Dario and Daniela Amodei who established Anthropic after prior large-scale LLM experience elsewhere in the industry.
A named capability and cost band in the Claude family (e.g., Opus, Sonnet, Haiku) that users or developers select for a task.
The period when Claude became available programmatically via Anthropic's developer platform, enabling third-party applications.
